cart.title: Cart
cart.checkoutCompleteHint: This token is tied to an order awaiting payment. Start a new cart to add more items.
cart.emptyDefault: Your cart is empty. Add products from the catalogue or open a product page.
cart.emptyProduct: Your cart is empty. Add this product or browse the catalogue.
cart.savedOnServerHint: Line items live in your database. This browser stores only the order token. Copy a link to reopen the same cart elsewhere or after clearing site data.

home.searchPlaceholder: Type to filter by name or description…
home.emptyCatalog: No products are available right now.

product.notFoundHint: This product may have been removed or the link is invalid.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Use your account to link carts and orders (demo — no email verification).

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Password must be at least 8 characters. Use a strong password you do not reuse elsewhere.

account.title: Account
account.intro: Update your contact details and default shipping address. Checkout can pre-fill from here.
account.changePasswordHint: Enter your current password, then choose a new one (at least 8 characters).
account.avatarHint: Leave blank for the default person icon. Use a full URL (http or https) that points to an image.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.signedInDelivery: You are signed in as {email}. Delivery details are required before payment.
checkout.saveToProfile: Save this phone & address to my account profile
checkout.orderPendingHint: Order {reference} — use the details below (demo payment details — not real banking credentials).
checkout.footerNote: No payment gateway is connected. Tutors can verify the order row in the database: status pending_payment, shipping_*, and user_id.
checkout.activeOrderHint: This cart token is already linked to a submitted order (awaiting payment). Start a new cart to place another order.

atm_transfer.label: Bank transfer (ATM / internet banking)
atm_transfer.description: Pay from any Australian bank using BSB and account number. May appear as OSKO or direct credit.

pay_id.label: PayID
pay_id.description: Use your banking app to send to our PayID (email type). Fast transfer in many cases.

bpay.label: BPAY
bpay.description: Pay from online banking using our biller code and your reference (BPAY View compatible where available).

payDetail.atmNote: Demo only. Do not send real money to these details.
payDetail.payidNote: Demo only. This PayID is not registered for real payments.
payDetail.bpayDisclaimer: Placeholder only. Use real BPAY details only from genuine invoices.
